division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Offenses Against Registration Laws and Suspension, Revocation, and Cancellation of Registration

markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 5. Offenses Against Registration Laws and Suspension, Revocation, and Cancellation of Registration [8800 - 8804]
##### § 8801

The department may suspend, cancel, revoke, or renew any permanent registration made under Section 4155 when the department determines that it is advisable to reissue the registration.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The department may suspend, cancel, revoke, or renew any permanent registration made under Section 4155 when the department determines that it is advisable to reissue the registration.
